name: Standard Applicants – GET detail – 400 missing/invalid date

response.body:
{
  "type": "about:blank",
  "title": "Bad Request",
  "status": 400,
  "detail": "Required query parameter 'date' is missing or invalid. Expected format 'yyyy-MM-dd'.",
  "path": "{{request.path}}",
  "timestamp": "{{now format=\"yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX\"}}",
  "traceId": "{{randomValue length=12 type='ALPHANUMERIC'}}"
}
